questionText: Design a URL Shortener like Bitly.
sampleAnswer: A URL shortener converts long URLs to short aliases (e.g. bit.ly/abcd12). We need: 1. A relational or NoSQL database mapping short key -> long URL, 2. Base62 encoding on an auto-incrementing ID to generate keys, 3. Cache layer (Redis) to serve active redirects instantly, 4. HTTP 301 (Permanent Redirect) for cache friendliness.
keyPoints: Handling collisions or pre-generating keys with Key Generation Service (KGS)
Choice of HTTP redirect codes: 301 (Permanent) vs 302 (Temporary)
